title: Shift to Evidence Acquisition Engine (empirical sprint; kernel remains frozen)
reason: Kernel v1.0.0-rc1 is validated and frozen. Further schema design has diminishing returns. The bottleneck is real evidence. Build a reusable Evidence Acquisition pipeline (not only two one-off asset downloads) that hashes, extracts metadata, parses, inventories, grades, and preserves audit trails without inventing URLs or digests.
decision: Implement Evidence Acquisition Engine under tools/evidence_acquisition/ (operational code + stages JSON — not a frozen kernel schema).
Generalize Asset Acquisition to Evidence Acquisition (meshes are one evidence class).
Insert METADATA between INTEGRITY and PARSE.
Never invent source URLs, SHA-256 values, mesh inventories, or passport geometry links.
Do not auto-update the Component Passport until usable geometry is acquired and inventoried.
First engine execution against CAND-00031-CGT and CAND-771-GRAB must honestly report blocked status while URLs/bytes are absent.
